_meta.description: Pattern-based copy lint rules. Applied across install label bundle + all install-touching Kotlin files. Each rule has an id, a regex, a message, a severity (error/warn), and optional scope (glob patterns — if empty, applies globally to scan paths).

forbidden_patterns.message: Latin English word embedded in Devanagari string — use Devanagari transliteration (सबमिट, वेरिफाई, कन्फर्म, कैंसल, स्टेटस)
Long ी matra in 'verify' creates visible gap — use short ि (वेरिफाई, वेरिफिकेशन)
Use respectful plural 'काम कर रहे हैं' for named executors, not singular 'काम कर रहा है'
Use oblique case किसी भी वक्त / किसी भी समय, not nominative कोई भी
Install domain uses कनेक्शन, not ग्राहक — vocab swap rule
Leading whitespace inside hi value — trim
Trailing whitespace inside hi value — trim

required_patterns.message: INS-1050 banner + timeline must use Devanagari सबमिट
INS-1050 / INS-1053 banner must use Devanagari वेरिफाई (short ि)

_notes.allow_unicode_escape: When checking Kotlin files, the string may appear as Unicode escape sequences (\u0938\u0947...) rather than literal Devanagari. If this flag is set, the validator also tries the Unicode-escape form of the pattern.
